repos.name: palm-tree
repos.description: 🌴 An internet traffic noise generater using a ton of random parameters including: using 30+ personas, 10 parallel generators, chaos theory, live headlines, and more. Bash, Python, or both!

repos.name: Telespot
repos.description: 🔭TeleSpot OSINT lookup from Telephone number using DDGR + BING + GOOGLE + DEHASHED and uses pattern recognition correlations. NOW with TelespotX!

repos.name: Spin
repos.description: 🕸️  SpinWeb Browser - A full featured desktop application for OSINT, security, and extreme privacy. Next Generation Features and Advanced OSINT Tools. New Jessica Jones Version!

repos.name: xTELENUMSINT
repos.description: ☎️ xTELENUMSINT - A powerful new Chrome extension for Telephone OSINT (NUMSINT) that automates searches in Google using 10 different formats. It then generates an extensive report using pattern analysis with advanced options. No coding required.

repos.name: Telespotter
repos.description: 🦀 A version of Telespot in RUST - a tool that searches telephone numbers across Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, and Dehashed for phone numbers and focuses on identifying names, locations, and usernames in the results.

repos.name: opt-out-manual-2026
repos.description: 🫆 2026 DIY Opt-Out Manual For Removal From Over 400 Sites. The guide shows difficulty rating, an estimate of how long it will take, and the exact instructions to opt-out per site in an easy to read user manual. *osintframework.com*

repos.name: TeleSTOP
repos.description: 📵 A windows desktop program designed for one thing; to help you remove your data from 50+ people-search sites at the source. No cloud, no APIs, 100% local. Pairs with xTELENUMSINT for faster detection/reporting. Reduce spam calls. Lower your risk for identity theft. Take back control. NO coding required. 100% free.

repos.name: spicy-cat
repos.description: 💋 An online privacy tool that generates realistic digital personas and human-like behavioral noise to disrupt profiling, correlation, and attribution. For best results use TOR and Firefox. Coded in Python.

repos.name: TelespotXX
repos.description: 👁️‍🗨️ Telespot , TelespotX, and Telespotter ... all in ONE web app for easier use for all OSINT Specialists.

repos.name: blueTTool
repos.description: 🩵blueTTool is an easy to use web-based testing and management utility designed for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) devices. It is used with the Bluefy browser on iOS devices to bypass Apple's native Web Bluetooth restrictions.

repos.name: ofacebook
repos.description: 🪬 Ofacebook is an OSINT tool that expands a username/ID into high-signal URL variants using prefixes, with workflows, search goals, and an in-app assistant for investigative information gathering.

repos.name: quevidkit
repos.description: 📽️ quevidkit is a toolkit providing forensic video‑tampering analysis. It consists of a Python CLI/REST backend and a simple web front‑end that runs in the browser or connects to a FastAPI server.

repos.name: 4philly
repos.description: Look up any Philadelphia property’s L&I record — business licenses, open violations, and 311 complaints — pulled live from the city’s own data. Eclipse and Carto are cross-checked side by side, so you can see where the two sources disagree and which one to trust. Free, open-source, installable on phone or desktop.

repos.name: AoLpAgErThEmE
repos.description: An AOL styled theme for the Hak5 pineapple pager.

repos.name: EspectreFlashApp
repos.description: A simple web app to flash esp’s for espectre easily. Best used with chrome.

repos.name: zweather
repos.description: ⚡️Zweather is the honest weather forecast app that shows you the weather forecast and what prior forecasts have changed.
